---
title: "Sequential Interaction Demo"
id: "demo-it-se01-sp01"
section_id: "demo-it-se01-sec01"
session_id: "demo-it-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction or instructions for this accordion-based explanation here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.accordion}
**Dynamic Explanation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the detailed content or explanation that should be hidden until clicked._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the accordion here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-important}
**Strategic Note**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short introduction or instruction for this self-check exercise._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.self-check}
**Knowledge Reinforcement**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-4 short, low-stakes questions for the learner to consider before moving forward._]

- Question 1: What is the most important takeaway from this concept?
- Question 2: How does this apply to your own practice or research?
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a model answer, reflection points, or guidance on what a good response looks like._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief wrap-up or next-step prompt after the self-check._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Ordered Sequence Interaction Showcase</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
